fruit_description: Tiny, dry one-seeded achenes, usually ovoid to cylindrical.
flower_description: Tiny, button-like heads of tubular florets; yellowish to whitish; distinct from the dry achenes that follow.

fruit_description: Leguminous pods — linear to flat, often straight, curved or twisted, sometimes constricted between seeds.
flower_description: Globular heads or cylindrical spikes of many tiny florets dominated by stamens; golden-yellow to cream; not the flat or coiled pods (fruits).

fruit_description: Flat, straight to slightly curved legume pods typical of mimosoid legumes.
flower_description: Small globose heads of many white to cream florets with conspicuous stamens; not the thin legume pods.

fruit_description: Fleshy, oval to globose berries (cactus fruits).
flower_description: Large, funnel-shaped, nocturnal flowers with long tubes and many stamens; usually white; distinct from the spiny red fruits.

fruit_description: Flattened, often barbed or spiny achenes.
flower_description: Small yellow disk florets in burr-like heads with few or no rays; do not confuse with the spiny achenes (fruits).

fruit_description: Paired winged samaras (two-winged ‘helicopter’ fruits).
flower_description: Small 5‑petaled star-like flowers in drooping clusters; greenish‑yellow to reddish; distinct from the paired winged samaras (fruits).

fruit_description: Small, dry, flattened achenes.
flower_description: Flat-topped corymbs of tiny composite heads with white to pink rays and yellow discs; not the silky seed heads.

fruit_description: Small, elongated, dry achenes often subtended by persistent perianth parts.
flower_description: Slender spikes of tiny greenish flowers with papery, spine‑tipped bracts; distinct from the dry utricles (fruits).

fruit_description: Small, dry nut-like drupes or achenes.
flower_description: Slender, 4‑parted cream flowers with long exserted styles in short clusters; Proteaceae type; not the woody follicles (fruits).

fruit_description: Grass-type caryopses (small grain-like fruits enclosed by lemma/palea).
flower_description: Delicate grass panicles of tiny spikelets; green to purplish; flowers are within spikelets, not the mature grains.

fruit_description: Fleshy, ovoid to globose berries, sometimes lobed.
flower_description: Small 4‑petaled, starry white to greenish flowers with prominent stamens; not the fleshy drupes.

fruit_description: Flattened, slightly curved pods that release glossy, hard seeds (showy seeds often red).
flower_description: Small creamy flowers in racemes with numerous stamens; distinct from the twisted pods bearing bright red seeds.

fruit_description: Small, dry, often hairy nuts or achenes.
flower_description: Slender tubular 4‑parted flowers, orange‑red to cream, with a long style; in small clusters; not the woody nuts.

fruit_description: Three-lobed or multi-locular capsules that split open to release seeds.
flower_description: Passionflower relative: small greenish‑white flowers often with a fringed corona; not the berry‑like capsules.

fruit_description: Small, ribbed achenes often with short pappus bristles.
flower_description: Corymbs of small white flower heads of tubular florets; not the ribbed achenes that follow.

fruit_description: Ferns — produce spores on sori (no true fruits).
flower_description: No flowers (fern); reproduces via sori of sporangia on frond undersides.

fruit_description: Dry capsules, often 3- or 4-lobed, opening at maturity.
flower_description: Small greenish unisexual flowers; males in clusters; distinct from the three‑lobed capsules (fruits).

fruit_description: Elongated, cylindrical or slightly curved follicles or capsule-like fruits (mangrove-associated).
flower_description: Small, starry, fragrant white to cream blooms; distinct from the curved horn‑like fruits.

fruit_description: Woody capsules or dry dehiscent fruits (small, dry).
flower_description: Dense cylindrical spikes of many small white to cream flowers with long exserted styles; not the woody follicles.

fruit_description: Large, woody cones (conifer cones) that release winged seeds.
flower_description: No true flowers (conifer); pollen cones small; seed cones large and woody.

fruit_description: Small, narrow achenes with pappus hairs.
flower_description: Fluffy white to pale‑lilac heads of disc florets only; distinct from the small pappus‑bearing achenes.

fruit_description: Small, narrow achenes with pappus of hairs.
flower_description: Pom‑pom heads of soft, fuzzy tubular florets, blue‑lilac or white; not the tiny seeds that follow.

fruit_description: Fleshy, single-seeded or few-seeded berries or drupes, often ovoid.
flower_description: Small yellow to greenish, often fragrant flowers in panicles; not the fleshy three‑valved fruits.

fruit_description: Flattened, single-seeded samaras (winged fruits in clusters).
flower_description: Small greenish‑yellow flowers in large panicles; distinct from the papery winged samaras (fruits).

fruit_description: Grass caryopses — small grains enclosed in lemmas with short awns.
flower_description: Very delicate grass panicles of tiny spikelets; greenish to purplish; flowers occur within spikelets, not the grains.

fruit_description: Woody, globose to ovoid capsules or drupes.
flower_description: Small white to pinkish 4–5‑merous blossoms in clusters; not the spherical ribbed capsules (fruits).

fruit_description: Flat, papery legume pods, straight or slightly curved, usually dehiscent.
flower_description: Feathery pom‑pom heads of long exserted stamens, white to pink; distinct from the flattened pods.

fruit_description: Carnivorous aquatic plant — produces small dry capsules (minute) rather than fleshy fruit.
flower_description: Solitary small white flowers held above water on slender stalks; not the trap leaves.

fruit_description: Woody capsules that open to reveal a shiny black seed often partly covered by a red/orange aril.
flower_description: Small greenish‑white starry flowers; not the striking red arils around black seeds (the fruit).

fruit_description: Large, globose drupes (hard-shelled, nut-like seeds inside).
flower_description: White 5‑petaled blossoms often with reddish veins; not the large oily nut‑like fruits.

fruit_description: Tiny, subterranean nut-like fruits (minute dry fruits).

fruit_description: Woody cone-like infructescences composed of many small valves that contain winged seeds (samaras).
flower_description: Male flowers in brown catkin‑like spikes; female flowers tiny with red feathery stigmas; not the woody conelets (fruits).

fruit_description: Small, fleshy drupes, usually ovoid to globose.
flower_description: Small white to greenish 4–5‑merous flowers; not the 1–3 seeded drupes.

fruit_description: Small achenes (dry, one-seeded fruits typical of Asteraceae).
flower_description: Small yellowish‑white daisy heads of disc florets; not the pappus‑tufted achenes.

fruit_description: Flattened woody follicles that split along one side, releasing winged seeds.
flower_description: Showy racemes of red to orange tubular flowers with long exserted styles; not the woody follicles.

fruit_description: Dry capsules that split open to release numerous seeds; succulent leaves (not fleshy fruits).
flower_description: Tubular, drooping flowers in racemes; orange, red or yellow; not the dry capsules that follow.

fruit_description: Small, fleshy, globose drupes.
flower_description: Small white to greenish, starry flowers; not the shiny black drupes.

fruit_description: Fleshy or fleshy-capsular fruits containing aromatic seeds, often ovoid.
flower_description: Showy white to pinkish ginger flowers with a broad labellum; not the fleshy capsules that follow.

fruit_description: Long, slender, paired follicles that split to release many small, silky-winged seeds.
flower_description: Clusters of small creamy, star‑shaped, fragrant flowers; not the paired long follicles with silky seeds.

fruit_description: Paired fleshy drupes (often orange/red) or small berries.

fruit_description: Small, hard, burr-like or ridged achenes (some barbed).
flower_description: Unisexual heads: male heads tiny, yellowish and pollen‑rich; female heads inconspicuous; not the spiny burs (achenes).

fruit_description: Fleshy or dry capsules, often ridged, containing many seeds (ginger relative).

fruit_description: Small, dry capsules or schizocarps producing tiny seeds.

fruit_description: Grass caryopses — small grain-like fruits with associated bracts/awns.

fruit_description: Mistletoe — single-seeded, fleshy berries (sticky when ripe).

fruit_description: Small, dry, nut-like fruits (capsule-like).

flower_description: Single, open flowers with many stamens; white to pink/blue; not the later woolly seed heads.

fruit_description: Ferns — reproduce by spores, not fruits.
flower_description: No flowers (fern); large sori produce spores on frond undersides.

fruit_description: Woody, hard capsules (gumnut-type) that are urn-shaped to conical.

fruit_description: Dry, elongated cylindrical capsules that open to release seeds.

fruit_description: Small, dry achenes typical of Asteraceae.
flower_description: Daisy heads with white rays and yellow discs; not the dry seed heads that develop later.

fruit_description: Fleshy drupes or nut-like fruits (Meliaceae-type fruits).
flower_description: Small white to cream 4–5‑merous flowers in panicles; not the black or orange drupes.

fruit_description: Capsules or berries (Solanaceae relatives) — ovoid to globose berries or dry capsules.

fruit_description: Small berries or capsules depending on species (Solanaceae allied forms).

fruit_description: Small, fleshy drupes or nutlets borne singly or in clusters.

fruit_description: Small, dry capsules or nutlets (minute dry fruits).

fruit_description: Small siliques or silicles (Brassicaceae-type dry fruits) or small capsules.

fruit_description: Large, woody seed cones composed of numerous woody scales each bearing seeds.

fruit_description: Clusters of fleshy, round drupes (palm fruits).
flower_description: Sprays of small cream to white 3‑parted palm flowers; not the bright red drupes.

fruit_description: Fleshy, round to ovoid drupes in clusters (palm fruits).

fruit_description: Small, dry achenes often with a pappus.

fruit_description: Fern — spore-producing (no true fruits).
flower_description: No flowers (fern); sori borne on fronds.

fruit_description: Small, round to ovoid fleshy berries, often red when ripe.
flower_description: Small starry white to greenish, often nodding and fragrant flowers; not the red/orange berries.

fruit_description: Ferns — produce spores, not fruits.
flower_description: No flowers (fern); linear sori on undersides of fronds.

fruit_description: Small, fleshy drupes or capsules (aquatic herb tendencies).

fruit_description: Grass caryopses — small grain-like fruits typical of grasses.

fruit_description: Conifer — woody cones producing winged seeds.
flower_description: No flowers (conifer); pollen and seed cones present.

fruit_description: Small, dry utricles or bracteate fruits often enclosed by papery bracts.

fruit_description: Fleshy drupes, orange when ripe (small ovoid drupes).

fruit_description: Fleshy berries (cucurbit-like, small berries).

fruit_description: Grass caryopses — small grain-like fruits.

fruit_description: Small drupes or fleshy fruits (Laurales-type small berries).

fruit_description: Small achenes with pappus (Asteraceae-type dry fruits).

fruit_description: Small capsules or nutlets (dry fruits).

fruit_description: Small berries (fleshy) or drupe-like fruits.

fruit_description: Small drupes or capsules depending on species (dry to fleshy).

fruit_description: Fern — produces spores, not fruits.
flower_description: No flowers (fern); spores in sori beneath fronds.
